steps.text: Farmers grow food and look after animals so we can eat. They start work very early! First, the animals need feeding. Press Feed the animals!
steps.feedback: Half past five in the morning! It is nearly dark and the farmer is already up. The animals are hungry and cannot wait!

steps.text: After feeding the animals, the farmer goes out to work in the fields. Press Work the fields!
steps.feedback: Eight o'clock — the sun is up! The farmer is planting, digging, and watering. There is so much to do.

steps.text: At midday, the farmer stops to rest and eat. Press Rest at midday!
steps.feedback: Twelve o'clock — time for a rest. Farming is hard work and the farmer needs energy for the afternoon!

steps.text: Then, as the sun goes down, it is time to bring the animals safely inside. Press Bring animals in!
steps.feedback: Five o'clock — the animals are safe inside for the night. Feed the animals, work the fields, rest at midday, then home. That is the farmer's day!
